title: AI Edge on X: "The Ultimate Beginner’s Guide to Claude (March 2026) " / X

sections.title: Introduction to Claude
key_points: Claude positioned as AI that does 'real work' vs just giving instructions
Emphasizes task execution capabilities over other AI tools
Requires paid plan for full functionality
Interface overview with annotated screenshots

sections.title: Prompt Engineering and Context Management
key_points: 3-Part Prompt Formula: Set the stage, Define the task, Specify the rules
Advanced 10-step prompting structure from Anthropic
Context management tips: compact conversations, add files, use output restraints
Proper prompting saves tokens and time

sections.title: Model Selection Matrix
key_points: Claude Sonnet 4.6: everyday workhorse for 80% of tasks
Claude Opus 4.6: most intelligent, for complex reasoning with Extended Thinking feature
Claude Haiku 4.5: fastest and cheapest, for simple tasks
Model selection based on task complexity and speed requirements

sections.title: Basic Tools and Features
key_points: Connectors for Notion, Slack, Google Calendar integration
Claude Chrome extension for browser integration
Custom styling for response formatting
Projects for dedicated work hubs with shared context
Research Mode for comprehensive cited reports
Claude desktop app required for advanced features

sections.title: Advanced Tools
key_points: Claude Cowork: autonomous task execution and scheduling (desktop app only)
Claude Code: advanced AI coding tool for development tasks
Claude Skills: repeatable instructions and workflows
Cowork Plug-ins: automated employee roles combining multiple skills
Pre-built plug-ins available for Legal, Marketing, Finance domains

summary.title: Comprehensive Claude AI Guide: From Basics to Advanced Automation
takeaways: Claude offers superior task execution capabilities compared to other AI tools like ChatGPT
Proper prompt engineering using the 3-part formula significantly improves output quality
Different Claude models serve different purposes - Sonnet for daily work, Opus for complex reasoning, Haiku for speed
Advanced features like Cowork, Skills, and Plug-ins enable autonomous task execution and workflow automation
Desktop app unlocks the most powerful features not available in web interface
concepts: AI task execution vs instruction giving
actionable: Create Claude account and consider paid plan for full features
Implement 3-part prompt formula: context, task, rules
Use Sonnet 4.6 for 80% of daily tasks
Set up Connectors for frequently used tools
Install Claude Chrome extension for browser integration
Create Projects for recurring work with shared context
Download desktop app to access Cowork and advanced features
Build custom Skills for repetitive workflows
Explore pre-built Plug-ins for role-based automation
